desc: Full setup flow — Login, add 2 products to cart, navigate to Checkout page
preconditions: User has valid account: sreejith.s+4@webandcrafts.com / Password
steps:
1. Navigate to https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/login
2. Enter email: sreejith.s+4@webandcrafts.com
3. Enter password: Password
4. Click 'Login' button
5. Navigate to 'ALL JEWELLERY' (PLP) via header menu
6. Click on 'Aminah Diamond Ring'
7. On PDP, select a variant and click 'ADD TO CART'
8. Navigate back to PLP

10. On PDP, select a variant and click 'ADD TO CART'
11. Click cart icon in header
12. On Cart page, click 'CHECKOUT SECURELY'
13. Observe Checkout page loads
expected: User is logged in. Two products appear in cart. Checkout page loads at /checkout with Shipping Address form, Order Summary, and Payment section visible.

desc: Press browser back button after successful order — verify no duplicate order

4. If returned to checkout, attempt to click PAY NOW again
expected: Browser back either goes to cart (now empty) or checkout page shows 'Order already placed'. PAY NOW cannot submit duplicate order.

desc: OWASP — Verify CSRF token present in checkout form submission

5. Inspect the POST request payload in Network tab
expected: POST request includes a CSRF token (e.g., X-CSRF-Token header or hidden _token field). Token is unique per session.
